title: Copy paste in MAC OS App
excerpt:
I’m using Item Card and trying to do a simple copy paste to a phone number in the item card. works great in windows dosent work in MAC. anyone knows why? ars there more "bugs"using Monday in MAC? 
Thanks! 
Meytal
